summary: Backend-only testing for Florida-Flow / Vibez-654 / Friend-Notifier / God-Mode-Audit / Nova-Dealer / Beta-Feedback integration. All 18 new tests + all 33 regression tests pass (51/51). Renegade-Check helper code-reviewed and correct.

minor.issue: No index on (status, score, ended_at) — leaderboard sort will be slow once the collection grows. Recommend a compound index.

On auto-stand path inside roll_dice, the in-memory game dict is updated but the DB write happens via _settle which uses original locked_dice from doc — minor; current test passes because settlement uses unlocked_dice that was set in update. Confirm via direct unit test.
No auth gate. Pure function so OK, but consider rate-limiting since burn/maintenance numbers leak fee policy.
Public endpoint — fine, but no version negotiation header for Unity client cache busting.

critical_code_review_comments: vibez_654.py _settle: payout logic awards 2x bet on ANY non-zero stand — even score=2 wins. That's generous; consider score-bracketed payouts.
vibez_654.py: leaderboard uses string-compared ISO timestamps for cutoff which works lexicographically but is fragile if formats ever drift.
florida_flow.py FeedbackPayload.severity allows 'critical' but UI only shows 4 buckets — confirm front-end sends matching values.
friend_notifier.py: in-memory _FRIEND_SOCKETS dict is per-process; will not fan out across multiple uvicorn workers. Acceptable for preview; flag for prod.
god_mode_audit.py: append-only ledger has no signature/hash chain — tampering by anyone with DB access is undetectable. Future hardening.
http_multiplayer.py _spades_renegade_check: looks correct. Edge case — if a card representation uses suffix > 1 char (e.g., '10S'), suit slicing still works since suit = card[-1]. Good.
test_credentials: Demo: POST /api/auth/demo-login (auto-provisions). Admin: POST /api/admin/vault-auth password=GlobalVibez_Founder_2025! code=000000.
seed_data_creation: TEST_-prefixed beta_feedback rows created by demo user during test run; not auto-cleaned (collection is small, manual prune ok).
context_for_next_testing_agent: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL must be exported in shell before running pytest — it is NOT auto-loaded from /app/frontend/.env. The test file falls back to the literal preview URL but the env export keeps it portable. New routers are registered inside a try/except in server.py around line 1716 (vibez_654, friend_notifier, god_mode_audit, florida_flow) — if any import error happens, the four endpoints silently disappear; check supervisor backend logs for ImportError before debugging 404s.
